OSRSM-v0.1.8.description:
So many changes,
We got a new name!
Sailing exists!
Boats are real again!
Fairy Rings are actually tracked correctly
the _x rule fragments work!
Culling sucks less!
we can make images (if you're on source)
New UT /explain macro! ( /explain where chunk_... and it tells you where that is!)
WAY more tests!
More input sanitation on the parser!
more event tasks are not made real for no reason!

Did i mention we have a new name!
And can run on the 0.6.7 RC2! From an apworld!
OSRSM-v0.1.8.title: OSRSMembers v0.1.8
